name: pi-repo-baby
description: Repository map generator for Pi — gives the agent structural awareness of any codebase via Tree-sitter
author: k2-888

scripts.install-deps: python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./venv/bin/python -m pip install tree-sitter-c-sharp tree-sitter-language-pack==0.13.0
